title: Fix bugs in memory pool allocator
instruction: The memory pool allocator in mempool.c has multiple bugs. Read mempool.h for the API contract, then fix: (1) double-free is not detected (should return error), (2) realloc loses old data (should copy), (3) mempool_check doesn't validate linked list prev pointers, (4) fragmentation metric is always 0, (5) usable_size returns wrong value. Run test.sh to verify basic functionality. The hidden tests will check double-free detection, data preservation on realloc, and fragmentation reporting.
difficulty_rationale: Multi-bug memory allocator repair spanning ownership, linked structures, realloc behavior, metrics, and C memory-safety reasoning.
